'''Nanna''' was a [[Nanny droid/Legends|nanny droid]] with a [[Gender/Legends|feminine personality]].

==History==
Nanna first belonged to [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] and was assigned to look after her three children: [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]], [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]], and [[Anakin Solo]].<ref name="CE3">[[Crimson Empire III: Empire Lost 1|''Crimson Empire III: Empire Lost'' 1]]</ref>

Nanna later belonged to [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke]] and [[Mara Jade Skywalker]] and was assigned to protect their son, [[Ben Skywalker]].

Nanna featured "devotion circuits" that enabled her to protect Ben at all costs. Although Nanna was occasionally tricked by Ben into shutting down, she was a force to be reckoned with—concealed within her upper arms were powerful [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] cannons.

Nanna was a [[Defender Droid]], a redesigned [[YVH 1]] droid produced by [[Tendrando Arms]] that was combined with a [[TDL nanny droid]]. Nanna's face was cherubic and pleasant in appearance, but it concealed a truly impressive combat machine.
